name: Love Balls
author: Poki
description: Reunite the star-crossed lovers in Love Balls! In this drawing puzzle game, you have to make sure the two dots meet each other. However, there's obstacles in their path! Draw lines to cross gaps and make bridges so that the two dots can roll towards each other. If they meet, you win! If one of the two dots falls of the edge, it's game over. Don't worry if you get stuck, you can always ask for a helpful hint. Can you beat every level? How to play Love Balls? Use the mouse to draw lines and help the Love Balls roll towards each other! Who created Love Balls? Love Balls was created by Lion Studio. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Love Balls for free? You can play Love Balls for free on Poki. Can I play Love Balls on mobile devices and desktop? Love Balls can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
